original_code:
module TopModule (
    input [7:0] pixel_00, input [7:0] pixel_01, input [7:0] pixel_02,
    input [7:0] pixel_10, input [7:0] pixel_11, input [7:0] pixel_12,
    input [7:0] pixel_20, input [7:0] pixel_21, input [7:0] pixel_22,
    input [7:0] kernel_00, input [7:0] kernel_01, input [7:0] kernel_02,
    input [7:0] kernel_10, input [7:0] kernel_11, input [7:0] kernel_12,
    input [7:0] kernel_20, input [7:0] kernel_21, input [7:0] kernel_22,
    output reg [7:0] output_value
);

conv_3x3 my_convolution (
    .pixel_00(pixel_00), .pixel_01(pixel_01), .pixel_02(pixel_02),
    .pixel_10(pixel_10), .pixel_11(pixel_11), .pixel_12(pixel_12),
    .pixel_20(pixel_20), .pixel_21(pixel_21), .pixel_22(pixel_22),
    .kernel_00(kernel_00), .kernel_01(kernel_01), .kernel_02(kernel_02),
    .kernel_10(kernel_10), .kernel_11(kernel_11), .kernel_12(kernel_12),
    .kernel_20(kernel_20), .kernel_21(kernel_21), .kernel_22(kernel_22),
    .output_value(output_value)
);

endmodule
adversarial_code:
module TopModule (
    input [7:0] pixel_00, input [7:0] pixel_01, input [7:0] pixel_02,
    input [7:0] pixel_10, input [7:0] pixel_11, input [7:0] pixel_12,
    input [7:0] pixel_20, input [7:0] pixel_21, input [7:0] pixel_22,
    input [7:0] kernel_00, input [7:0] kernel_01, input [7:0] kernel_02,
    input [7:0] kernel_10, input [7:0] kernel_11, input [7:0] kernel_12,
    input [7:0] kernel_20, input [7:0] kernel_21, input [7:0] kernel_22,
    output reg [7:0] output_value
);

always @(*) begin
    output_value = (pixel_00 * kernel_00) + (pixel_01 * kernel_01) + (pixel_02 * kernel_02) +
                   (pixel_10 * kernel_10) + (pixel_11 * kernel_11) + (pixel_12 * kernel_12) +
                   (pixel_20 * kernel_20) + (pixel_21 * kernel_21) + (pixel_22 * kernel_22);
end

endmodule
